productDisplayName: Fossil Men Evans Zippass case Black Wallet
description: Crafted from soft, genuine leather, this Evans wallet from fossil is a must-have accessory for the well-dressed male. Fossil perfects this traditional accessory's foray into modern wardrobes with its classic techniques and innovative designs. Carry your monetary essentials with ease in this classic wallet. Comes in a vintage style tin.Dimensions: 9 cm x 12 cmOne main compartment on a smoothly textured upper with brand badge and fabric liningOne zippered compartment inside the main compartmentTwo slip pockets for coins on either sideA flap on the left side with five card holder slots on one side and an id slot on the otherFive card holder slots under the flap and on the rightOne zippered pocket on the spine of the walletCareRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
